executive_summary.narrative: This release shows confirmed, live policy violations across the deployed runtime surface: privilege escalation, root execution, missing seccomp profiles, and unsigned images, all confirmed by Kyverno and KubeArmor against running workloads.

top_risks.title: Privilege escalation and root execution live on running pods
top_risks.impact: Confirmed live, not a static config check.
top_risks.why_it_matters: This is an active, exploitable condition right now.
top_risks.recommended_action: Harden securityContext across all deployed workloads.

priority_actions.title: Harden all workload securityContexts in one pass
priority_actions.rationale: Resolves privilege-escalation, root-execution, seccomp, and capabilities findings together — they're all the same class of fix.
priority_actions.expected_risk_reduction: Eliminates every confirmed live container-hardening violation.

release_readiness.rationale: Multiple critical, live runtime violations confirmed by two independent tools (Kyverno and KubeArmor).
